title: Attorney General Bonta, Governor Newsom Slam U.S. SenateГўв‚¬в„ўs Illegal Efforts to Stop CaliforniaГўв‚¬в„ўs Clean Vehicle Policies
content:
California Attorney General Rob Bonta and California Governor Gavin Newsom announced today that the state will file a lawsuit as Republicans in the U.S. Senate target CaliforniaГўв‚¬в„ўs clean vehicles program.
Гўв‚¬Е“With these votes, Senate Republicans are bending the knee to President Trump once again,Гўв‚¬Вќ said Attorney General Rob Bonta. Гўв‚¬Е“The weaponization of the Congressional Review Act to attack CaliforniaГўв‚¬в„ўs waivers is just another part of the continuous, partisan campaign against CaliforniaГўв‚¬в„ўs efforts to protect the public and the planet from harmful pollution. As we have said before, this reckless misuse of the Congressional Review Act is unlawful, and California will not stand idly by. We need to hold the line on strong emissions standards and keep the waivers in place, and we will sue to defend CaliforniaГўв‚¬в„ўs waivers.Гўв‚¬Вќ
author: Analysts Account
source: State of California Department of Justice
